  n="$1"
  for ((i=1;i<=n;i++)); do
    s=""
    (( i%3==0 )) && s+="Fizz"
    (( i%5==0 )) && s+="Buzz"
    echo "${s:-$i}"
  done
}

# Caso: Promedio (clásico) | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Clásicos
solve() {
  if [ $# -eq 0 ]; then echo ""; return; fi
  local expr="0"; local n=0
  for x in "$@"; do expr="$expr + $x"; n=$((n+1)); done
  echo "scale=12; ($expr)/$n" | bc -l
}

  echo "scale=12; $expr" | bc -l
}

snippets.C0646:
# Caso: Validar RUT chileno | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Validación
solve() {
  local rut="$1"
  local clean
  clean="$(echo "$rut" | tr -d '.- ' | tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]')"
  [ ${#clean} -ge 2 ] || return 1

  local body="${clean::-1}"
  local dv="${clean: -1}"

  [[ "$body" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] || return 1

  local sum=0
  local mul=2
  local i d
  for (( i=${#body}-1; i>=0; i-- )); do
    d="${body:i:1}"
    sum=$(( sum + d * mul ))
    if [ $mul -eq 7 ]; then mul=2; else mul=$((mul+1)); fi
  done

  local mod=$(( 11 - (sum % 11) ))
  local dvCalc
  if [ $mod -eq 11 ]; then dvCalc="0"
  elif [ $mod -eq 10 ]; then dvCalc="K"
  else dvCalc="$mod"
  fi

  [ "$dv" = "$dvCalc" ]
}

snippets.C0661:
# C0661 · Retry + backoff + timeout (Intermedio, Resiliencia)
retries=5; delay=0.2
for i in $(seq 0 $retries); do
  if my_command; then exit 0; fi
  [ $i -eq $retries ] && exit 1
  jitter=$(python - <<'PY'
import random; print(random.random()*0.1)
PY
)
  sleep $(python - <<PY
import math
print(min($delay*(2**$i)+$jitter,5))
PY
)
done
